address.address1: Jl. Soekarno - Hatta, Lampeuneurut Ujong Blang, Kec. Darul Imarah

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 5-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Children 0-5 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Take a look at these facilities:
Things to do, ways to relax

features.featureName: Hot water linen and laundry washing

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Pilihan jatuh ke Sri Budaya karena melihat ada 1 queen bed dan 1 single bed dalam kamar. Dengan kami yang memiliki 1 anak berumur 11 tahun dan 1 berumur 5 tahun, ini benar-benar bagus. Sebab di hotel biasa, kami perlu menambah extra bed agar istirahat bisa maksimal. 

Kamar dengan gaya mezzanine ini memang bagus untuk keluarga. Ada sofa dan TV juga untuk bersantai di bagian bawah, ada sink dan peralatan makan juga disediakan dan tipe Suite-nya ada 2 kamar mandi (1 bathtub). 

Hanya saja, karena ini lebih condong ke Villa, maka staffnya lebih sedikit sehingga tidak ada refill minum dan pembersihan kamar setiap hari. Bekas makan pesanan kami saja yang kami taruh di depan kamar sampai lama tidak diambil staffnya. 

Sistem air panas di bathtubnya agak error, kalau distel ke panas jadinya panas banget dan nggak bisa balik ke normal lagi walaupun diputar ke arah cool. Sehingga harus dimatikan dahulu dan hidupkan pelan-pelan. Tapi overall, kamar mandi bathtubnya bagus dan (terlalu) lebar. 

Kamar Family Studionya juga oke walaupun kompornya tidak bisa dihidupkan. Dan kamar Deluxe Double-nya juga oke karena hanya terdiri dari 1 lantai untuk orang tua yang tidak bisa naik tangga terlalu jauh.

FYI, kami memesan 1 kamar Suite, 1 kamar Family Studio dan 1 kamar Deluxe Double.

Untuk sarapan, menunya enak dan 1 kamar bisa dicover sampai 4 orang. Hanya saja waktu momen Idul Fitri sarapan suka molor karena (katanya) cheff tidak datang dll. 😂

Semoga lain kali bisa lebih baik lagi fasilitasnya ya, overall tempat ini sudah baik dan nyaman.
comments.reviewTitle: Hotel untuk keluarga dengan 2 anak atau lebih

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Very comfortable and clean because it is still new. I ordered it for my mother's group, enjoyable and comfortable.
comments.originalComment: Nyaman banget dan bersih karena masih baru saya pesan buat rombongan ibu saya, menyenangkan dan nyaman

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
We booked last minute from the airport when our flight was cancelled. The hotel looked so good online but when we arrived we were quite disappointed. First we had to pay additional cost for checking in early, even though the room was finished and empty. As we traveled with a child with fever we paid an additional 200.000 idr for checking in early. The room itself was ok, but it wasn't very clean. There were hair on the floor and ants everywhere! Not only on the floor but in the beds aswell, in between the towels was a whole ants nest. Also there were no sheets on the bed only thick duvets - are they getting washed at all? Additionaly the two ACs couldn't cool the room enough as the heat was just coming through the windows. All in all really disappointing as the room price is quite high!
The pool was ok, little bit murky but for a short dip ok.
When we arrived they told us as it was Ramadan that there would be no breakfast but some kind of food in the evening to the room. But we didn't stay, we found a different hotel with less problems and left after a few hours. Also nobody asked why we left, seems they just didn't care. Wouldn't come back again.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Everything is recommended except for breakfast time. At 7:30 AM, I requested breakfast to be brought to my room because I had to pick up my child from the boarding school. I asked for breakfast to be stored in my room because I was worried that if I returned to the resort, it would be past breakfast time. However, the staff managing breakfast did not allow it. I even offered to take the breakfast to my room myself without bothering the staff, but I was not permitted to do so. Therefore, it feels unfair that I paid for the room + breakfast but was not allowed to receive breakfast.
comments.reviewTitle: All facilities are good except for the staff managing breakfast.
comments.originalTitle: Semua fasilitas baik kecuali staff yang mengelola sarapan pagi
comments.originalComment: Semua recomended kecuali waktu sarapan. Jam 07.30 saya meminta sarapan agar dibawa kekamar karena saya harus menjemput anak saya di pesantren. Saya meminta sarapan untuk bisa disimpan dikamar karena khawatir tiba kembali di resort sudah melebihi waktu sarapan.. tetapi staf yang mengelola sarapan tidak mengizinkan.. bahkan saya menawarkan agar saya sendiri yang membawa sarapan ke kamar tanpa merepotkan staff tetapi saya tidak diizinkan. Sehingga rugi saya membayar kamar + sarapan tapi tidak diizinkan untuk mendapat sarapan..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Please maintain cleanliness because there is a lot of poop from the cats and ants. They have complained and it was moved to the next room, but it is the same there. The shower water is small.
comments.originalComment:
Kebersihan tolong d jaga Krn banyak taik Cica+semut suda komplain d pindahin k kamar sebelah nya teryata sama juga 
Air shower kecil
